name: The Student Centered Learning
effect: Reframe instructor-led content delivery as learner-driven discovery. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: AUTONOMY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the learner selects from a pre-approved list of options: The experience is considered personalized.

clauses.name: ENGAGEMENT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If participation metrics are collected: The learning is considered active.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next quarter: The curriculum is unchanged and the instructor is back at the whiteboard.

witness_quote: They're driving their own journey now.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Who wrote the choices they're choosing from?
